name: The Defender: Farm and Castle 2
short_description: You are a wizard tasked with defending the castle from invading monsters. Inside the castle, you can manage resources, harvest crops, gain experience points to level up, and learn new skills and abilities to battle increasingly powerful enemies.
detailed_description:
You are a wizard tasked with defending the castle from invading monsters. Inside the castle, you can manage resources, harvest crops, gain experience points to level up, and learn new skills and abilities to battle increasingly powerful enemies.

The Defender: Farm and Castle 2 is an easy-to-play game suitable for everyone. It combines elements of castle defense and shooting games, with enemies attacking from both the left and right, including ground and flying foes. Each time you upgrade the castle, powerful enemy bosses appear. Additionally, dungeon battles can summon boss enemies as well.

It's time to defend the castle from enemies! Let’s defeat the bosses and earn achievements!
